headroomEstimate.basis: local-cpu concurrent run docs/hour vs G0-CAP target

queueAgeSimulation.label: simulation_from_measured_local_cpu_rate
queueAgeSimulation.effectiveRateNote: set to zero for queue simulation because one or more workload documents failed

notes: Local-cpu smoke/sizing only; re-run on on-prem-reference Profile B for the gate.
Queue age values are deterministic simulations from measured converter service rate.
does NOT claim Profile B G0-CAP-INGEST-THROUGHPUT pass evidence
